title: TaxCategory
$comment: A9 SDK public I/O schema: public-safe tax-category classification/reference contract only. Tax is a review/matching signal only and is never required for matching (FD-10). This schema is deliberately generic and carries no country-specific legal logic, posting rules, or country-pack tax computation. It does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete. It must never encode matching logic/weights, trust weights/tiers, scoring formulas, learning internals, or any private engine/Core internals.
